topic: Marin Daily: Component sourcing, optical stack, electrical design, firmware progress — Sunday Mar 8
summary: Dual-track hardware development: precision prototype for validation, consumer version for scale.

actionItems.text: Source precision optical components for reference prototype
actionItems.description: Identify and procure Hamamatsu photodiode arrays, precision ADCs, environmental sensors, and reference standards for $15K precision prototype. This reference unit validates measurement approach and generates calibration data for consumer version. Establishes technical credibility and provides authentic data for content development.
acceptanceCriteria: Precision components ordered with confirmed 6-week delivery
Component specifications documented for firmware integration
Cost breakdown and sourcing timeline confirmed

actionItems.text: Architect unified firmware supporting dual sensor configurations
actionItems.description: Design modular firmware architecture with sensor abstraction layer, calibration framework, and environmental compensation algorithms. Same codebase supports both precision prototype validation and consumer sensor implementation. Architecture enables seamless transition from validation to production without code rewrites.

actionItems.text: Design consumer hardware industrial package with precision upgrade path
actionItems.description: Create industrial design for consumer optical hardware optimizing for size, power, thermal management, and cost constraints. Design accommodates future upgrade to precision components while maintaining market-appropriate pricing and form factor. Includes thermal analysis and power optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Consumer package 3D models and specifications completed
Cost optimization strategy with upgrade path defined

actionItems.text: Define precision prototype to consumer handoff protocols
actionItems.description: Establish clear data flow and validation protocols between precision prototype testing and consumer sensor calibration. Ensure precision measurements directly inform consumer lookup tables and compensation algorithms. Creates seamless technical bridge between validation and production phases.

topPriorities: Source precision optical components for reference prototype development
Design unified firmware architecture supporting both precision and consumer sensor tracks
Begin consumer hardware industrial design with upgrade path to precision components

ceoDirectives.directive: What is Lever's direction? → Hybrid — personal tool now with product optionality built in
Keep faith content as separate standalone section (not merged into Family tab)
Keep cash liquid — no deployment until post-launch revenue data
App Store submission: full current build (all 4 tabs) as-is with faith lessons. Submit immediately after merge, ship modal as day-one update.
Paper trading MVP: manual entry (6 weeks), basic free / advanced analytics premium. Integrate into current Lever app finance tab.
Launch with delayed market data for both free and premium tiers. Real-time as future ultra-premium.
Org flattened to 8 C-suite agents. No permanent sub-agents — spawn dynamically via sessions_spawn.
